patterns.name: Bursted Snapshot Verification
patterns.description: Using ffmpeg to capture 3fps bursts (1-3s) instead of continuous video allows for temporal grounding without VRAM bloat.

patterns.name: Region-Locked Probing
patterns.description: Scoping visual observation to the bounding box of the last interaction eliminates background noise and reduces hallucination risk.

patterns.name: LIFO State Pruning
patterns.description: Immediate flushing of visual buffers after insight generation is mandatory for LangGraph checkpoint stability.

errors_encountered: Syntax error in ScreenCapture.ts due to misplaced closing brace during multi-method injection.
recommendations: Extend Visual Diff to use Structural Similarity Index (SSIM) metadata from ffmpeg for higher fidelity change detection.
